rows.description: Computus Francisci Webber Rectoris a 2do Die
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash description, confirmed 'Rectoris a 2do Die' visually. Both agreed on header type and no amounts. gpt-5-mini's 'Rectory a 2d &c' was less accurate.
rows.section_header: Computus Francisci Webber Rectoris a 2do Die

rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash description for exact transcription 'Novembris'. Both agreed on header type and no amounts. gpt-5-mini's 'Novembri' was less accurate.
Selected gemini-flash description, visually confirmed 'Recepta'. gpt-5-mini's 'Receipta' was incorrect. Both agreed on header type and no amounts.
Selected gemini-flash description, visually confirmed '£: S: D:' with colons and uppercase 'S'. gpt-5-mini used periods and lowercase 's'. Both agreed on header type and no amounts.
Selected gemini-flash for accurate description 'Longwitlenham' and correct fraction '0.25'. gpt-5-mini misidentified description as 'Longwittham' and '1/4' as '1/2'.
rows.english_description: Arrear payment received from the Long Wittenham estate.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Arrear payment received from the Long Wittenham estate, amounting to £66 9s 11.25d.

rows.notes: Visually confirmed description 'Chace Hill' applies to this row due to the brace. Amounts are P:10, S:10, D:0. gpt-5-mini misread pounds as '5' and pence as '10'. gemini-flash correctly read amounts but incorrectly left description blank.
rows.english_description: Arrear receipt from the Chase Hill holding.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Arrear receipt from the Chase Hill holding, amounting to £10 10s 0d.

rows.notes: Row was identified by gemini-flash, but gpt-5-mini completely missed it. Visually confirmed the row exists with amounts P:9, S:18, D:11, F:0.75. The description 'Chace Hill' from the previous row applies here due to the brace. gemini-flash correctly extracted the numerical values, but left the description blank. Overrode description based on image.
rows.english_description: Arrear receipt from the Chase Hill holding (second entry).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Arrear receipt from the Chase Hill holding (second entry), amounting to £9 18s 11.75d.

rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash description 'Yardington Rect:' as visually more accurate (initial 'Y' and 'a'). Amounts are in consensus and clear. gpt-5-mini read 'Yeardington'.
rows.english_description: Arrear receipt from the Yardington rectory.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Arrear receipt from the Yardington rectory, amounting to £17 10s 0d.

rows.english_description: Arrear payment from Grethewan covering a three‑year period (triennium).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Arrear payment from Grethewan for the triennium, amounting to £18 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Consensus on description and whole amounts. Visually confirmed fraction to be 0.25 (1/4), overriding gpt-5-mini's misidentification of a halfpenny symbol (0.5).

Visually confirmed this as a new section 'header' with no amounts (agreeing with gpt-5-mini on type and absence of amounts, disagreeing with gemini-flash's 'entry' type and inferred amounts). Overrode both descriptions; visually reads as 'Southewennington Rect.'.
Selected gemini-flash description 'Tayer' and shillings '8' as visually more accurate. gpt-5-mini misread description as 'Jayer' and shillings as '4'.
